title: Quick-fix Kebab Aubergine Quesadilla
description: An earthy and chewy quick-fix Kenyan dish featuring baby aubergines that are boiled, halal-friendly and quick to prepare.

ingredients.name: Chicken Kebab Mix (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a more traditional kebab flavor, you can add this

instructions: Wash and dry the baby aubergine. Cut into rounds about half an inch thick.
Season both sides of the aubergine with salt. Set aside to soften, typically around 15 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix flour with water until you get a smooth batter. Adjust consistency as needed for frying.

Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Dip each side of the aubergine into the flour mixture and fry until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side. Remove from pan and drain excess oil.
If using chicken kebab mix, sprinkle it evenly over one half of the fried aubergine and place in another part of the pan for a few seconds to toast lightly.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce or as is.
